foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Lack of serosa and anatomical relations determine perforation sites (Killian's triangle, left posterolateral for Boerhaave's)

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Forceful vomiting against a closed glottis (Boerhaave's) involves pressure dynamics assessed by manometry

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Full-thickness caustic burns and post-dilatation perforation are common aetiologies

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Delayed or extensive perforations may require esophagectomy with reconstruction

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Perforation during endoscopic staging or stenting of esophageal cancer is an iatrogenic cause
